status: AUTHORITATIVE (DCS II + III) — HI class spec series + official BU13 salary schedule (eff 2025-07-01); supervisor flagged
administering_agency: Hawaii Department of Human Services (DHS) — Disability Determination Branch (within the Division of Vocational Rehabilitation, DVR)
salary_schedule_title: State of Hawaii DHRD Salary Schedule, Bargaining Unit 13 (Professional and Scientific Employees), Effective 07/01/2025
bargaining_status: HGEA (AFSCME-affiliated), Bargaining Unit 13 (Professional and Scientific). Unit 13 contract 2021-2025 (a successor was in progress); the BU13 salary schedule eff 2025-07-01 is the official published rate.
pay_structure: Hawaii Salary Range (SR) system; each SR has steps. The BU13 (non-supervisory) schedule prints steps D through M. min = Step D (schedule minimum), max = Step M (schedule maximum). Annual figures used.
notes: The HI DDS examiner series is the Disability Claims Specialist (DCS) series (class spec 3.386 covers DCS II/III/IV/V/VI; DCS IV is the working-supervisor level). SR assignments verified from official HI state job postings: DCS II = SR-18 (DHS posting confirms 'DVR Disability Determination Branch', SR-18) and DCS III = SR-20. Annual min/max from the official DHRD BU13 salary schedule (eff 2025-07-01). NOTE on hiring vs schedule range: HI postings quote a hiring sub-range (e.g. DCS II 'Steps C to I'); the full salary range here uses the official non-supervisory schedule's Step D (min) to Step M (max). The supervisor (DCS IV) SR was not authoritatively confirmed this session (SR-22 is the candidate by series pattern, schedule values shown but grade UNVERIFIED). Corrections to prior notes: examiner class is Disability Claims Specialist (not generic 'Disability Determination Examiner'); SR system confirmed.

Disability Claims Specialist II.basis: Authoritative — SR-18 verified from official HI DHS job posting (Disability Claims Specialist II, DVR Disability Determination Branch, SR-18); annual from the official DHRD BU13 salary schedule SR-18 row (eff 2025-07-01).

Disability Claims Specialist III.basis: Authoritative — SR-20 verified from official HI state job posting (Disability Claims Specialist III, SR-20); annual from the official DHRD BU13 salary schedule SR-20 row (eff 2025-07-01).

Disability Claims Specialist IV (working.basis: grade assignment UNVERIFIED — DCS IV is the working-supervisor level (class spec 3.388). SR-22 is the candidate by the series' +2-SR pattern (II=SR-18, III=SR-20), and the SR-22 schedule row is shown, but an official SR-22 confirmation for DCS IV was not located this session. Treat the SR-22 mapping (and thus these figures) as a candidate, NOT authoritative.

data_quality_flags.confidence: high (DCS II + III); candidate (DCS IV supervisor)
